common.name: Name
common.nameMinLength: Name must contain at least 1 character
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 4 characters
profile.title: User profile: {{name}}
profile.updateError: Could not update user. Try again.
board.updateError: Could not update board. Try again.
board.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this board?
board.confirmDeleteMember: Are you sure you want to delete this member?
board.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave this board?
board.confirmArchive: Are you sure you want to archive this board?
board.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore this board from archive?
board.name: Board name
board.noArchivedLists: No archived lists found for this board
board.confirmArchiveList: Are you sure you want to archive this list?
board.confirmArchiveCard: Are you sure you want to archive this card?
list.name: List name
list.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
list.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore this list from archive?
card.createError: Could not create card. Try again.
card.updateError: Could not update card. Try again.
card.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
card.confirmDeleteComment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
card.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore this card from archive?
chat.error: AI service error. Check the key or server.
chat.projectContextReady: Project context connected. You can now ask about boards, lists, and cards.
chat.create.noBoards: I could not find any boards. Create a board first.
chat.create.boardNotFound: I could not find that board. Write the exact board name.
chat.create.listNotFound: I could not find that list. Write the exact list name.
chat.create.board.confirm: Create board **{{name}}**? Write **yes** to confirm, or **cancel**.
chat.create.list.askBoard: Which board should the list be added to? Available boards: {{boards}}.
chat.create.list.confirm: Create list **{{list}}** in board **{{board}}**? Write **yes** to confirm, or **cancel**.
chat.create.list.success: Done. List **{{list}}** was created in board **{{board}}**.
chat.create.card.askBoard: Which board should the card be added to? Available boards: {{boards}}.
chat.create.card.noLists: Board **{{board}}** has no lists. Create a list first.
chat.create.card.askList: Which list should the card be added to? Available lists: {{lists}}.
chat.create.card.askDueDate: Write the due date as `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm` or **skip**.
chat.create.card.invalidDueDate: I could not understand the date. Write it as `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm` or **skip**.
chat.create.card.invalidPriority: I could not understand the priority. Write **Low**, **Medium**, **High**, or **Urgent**.
chat.create.card.invalidStatus: I could not understand the status. Write **Draft**, **Published**, or **Done**.
chat.create.card.success: Done. Card **{{card}}** was created in list **{{list}}** of board **{{board}}**.
